title: ZAU
description: Among us gamemode plugin for funzies :)
body:
**ZAU**
This plugin is an adaptation of Youtuber Zyye's Custom Murder plugin he used in:

- youtube.com/watch?v=JQy0IT2xYOw
- youtube.com/watch?v=rsnX5gpFo04

This plugin is a minigame where 1+ person(s) is selected to be a murder among a group of people attempting to beat the game. If any of the players can beat the game, the imposter(s) lose and the game is over. If any person dies they will be permanently dead and forced to spectate the game. Player chat is limited to nearby players in a very small radius, so other mods/plugins are encouraged like voice-chat.
